scripts.check: npm run check:contracts && npm run check:structure && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:controller
scripts.check:controller: cd controller && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run check && bun run test:unit
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:controller:integration && npm run test:frontend:e2e
scripts.dev:agent-runtime: npm --prefix services/agent-runtime run build && node services/agent-runtime/dist/server.js
